character.name: Roscoe Full-Fifth Fool-Fists
character.proficiencies: Light Armor, Simple Weapons, Hand Crossbows, Longswords, Rapiers, Shortswords, Musical Instruments, Saving Throw: Dexterity, Saving Throw: Charisma

spell.name: Vicious Mockery
spell.text: WIS save or 4d4 psychic damage and disadvantage on next attack roll. Safe concentration action.

spell.name: Minor Illusion
spell.text: Create a sound or image of an object. Investigation check to see through.

spell.name: Mage Hand
spell.text: Spectral hand manipulates objects up to 10 lb.

spell.name: Prestidigitation
spell.text: Minor magical tricks: sensory effects, clean/soil, light/snuff, flavor, trinkets.

spell.name: Healing Word
spell.text: 1d4+5 healing. Upcast: +1d4 per level. PICK UP DOWNED ALLIES.

spell.name: Faerie Fire
spell.text: 20ft cube. DEX save or outlined in light. Attacks have ADVANTAGE against affected creatures. Negates invisibility.

spell.name: Silvery Barbs
spell.text: When creature succeeds on attack/check/save: force reroll, take lower. Give one ally advantage on next attack/check/save within 1 minute.

spell.name: Hold Person
spell.text: WIS save or PARALYZED (auto-crit in melee). Humanoids only. Repeat save at end of turn. Upcast: +1 target per level.

spell.name: Suggestion
spell.text: WIS save or follow a "reasonable" suggestion for duration. Social nuke.

spell.name: Misty Step
spell.text: Teleport 30ft to visible unoccupied space. ESCAPE BUTTON.

spell.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spell.text: 30ft cube. WIS save or CHARMED + INCAPACITATED + speed 0. Ends if damaged or shaken awake. Encounter ender.

spell.name: Counterspell
spell.text: [MAGICAL SECRET] Auto-counter 3rd level or lower. Higher: ability check DC 10 + spell level. Your check: d20+8.

spell.name: Haste
spell.text: [MAGICAL SECRET] +2 AC, double speed, advantage on DEX saves, extra action (Attack/Dash/Disengage/Hide/Use Object). WARNING: If spell ends early, target can't move or act until end of next turn.

spell.name: Aura of Vitality
spell.text: [MAGICAL SECRET] Bonus action: one creature in aura regains 2d6 HP. 20d6 total healing over 1 minute.

spell.name: Greater Invisibility
spell.text: Target invisible for duration. Doesn't end when attacking or casting. ALLY BUFF.

spell.name: Dimension Door
spell.text: Teleport 500ft to location you describe or visualize. Can bring one willing creature your size or smaller. EXTRACTION.

spell.name: Find Greater Steed
spell.text: [MAGICAL SECRET] Summon Pegasus (90ft fly). Telepathic bond. Self-targeting spells affect mount. Permanent until killed.

spell.name: Hold Monster
spell.text: WIS save or PARALYZED. Works on ANY creature. Repeat save at end of turn. Combo with Unsettling Words.

spell.name: Greater Restoration
spell.text: End: charmed, petrified, curse, ability score reduction, HP max reduction.

spell.name: Mass Suggestion
spell.text: Up to 12 creatures. WIS save or follow reasonable suggestion. NO CONCENTRATION.

spell.name: Forcecage
spell.text: 10ft cage (bars) or 20ft cube (solid walls). NO SAVE. Teleport out requires DC 19 CHA save.

spell.name: Glibness
spell.text: Replace any CHA check roll with 15. Persuasion/Deception FLOOR 32. Magic detects you as truthful.

spell.name: Mind Blank
spell.text: IMMUNE to psychic damage, divination, charm, and creature-detecting effects. HELL ESSENTIAL.

spell.name: Foresight
spell.text: Can't be surprised. Advantage on attacks, checks, saves. Enemies have disadvantage vs target. NO CONCENTRATION. Cast on Fighter daily.

feature.name: Satyr: Fey
feature.text: Your creature type is fey, rather than humanoid. You are immune to spells that only affect humanoids (Hold Person, Charm Person, Dominate Person, etc.).

feature.name: Satyr: Magic Resistance
feature.text: You have advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

feature.name: Satyr: Mirthful Leaps
feature.text: Whenever you make a long or high jump, you can roll a d8 and add the number rolled to the number of feet you cover, even when making a standing jump.

feature.name: Satyr: Ram
feature.text: You can use your head and horns to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with them, you deal 1d4 + STR bludgeoning damage.

feature.name: Bardic Inspiration (d20)
feature.text: 5 uses per short rest. Bonus action, 60ft, give one creature an Inspiration die. Within 10 minutes, they can add d20 to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw. With Soulstring Banjo, your die is a d20 instead of d12.

feature.name: Jack of All Trades
feature.text: Add +3 (half proficiency) to any ability check that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus. Includes initiative and Counterspell checks.

feature.name: Song of Rest (d12)
feature.text: During short rest, if you or allies spend Hit Dice, each regains extra 1d12 HP.

feature.name: Expertise
feature.text: Double proficiency bonus for Persuasion, Deception, Performance (and one more).

feature.name: UNSETTLING WORDS
feature.text: **BONUS ACTION.** Spend 1 Bardic Inspiration. Target within 60ft subtracts your Inspiration die (d20) from their NEXT SAVING THROW before your next turn. USE BEFORE HOLD MONSTER.

feature.name: Silver Tongue
feature.text: When you roll a Persuasion or Deception check, treat any roll of 9 or lower as a 10. Your floor is 10 + 17 = 27.

feature.name: Unfailing Inspiration
feature.text: When an ally uses your Bardic Inspiration and still fails the roll, they keep the Inspiration die.

feature.name: Universal Speech
feature.text: Action. Choose up to CHA mod (5) creatures within 60ft. For 1 hour, they understand you regardless of language. 1/long rest or spend spell slot.

feature.name: Infectious Inspiration
feature.text: Reaction. When ally within 60ft uses Bardic Inspiration and SUCCEEDS, you can give a different creature within 60ft a Bardic Inspiration die without expending a use. CHA mod (5) times per long rest.

feature.name: Countercharm
feature.text: Action. For 1 minute, you and allies within 30ft have advantage on saves vs frightened and charmed. Must hear you, concentration.

item.name: Soulstring Banjo (Artifact)
item.text:
TWO SOULS, ONE SONG: Bardic Inspiration die becomes d20.
CRESCENDO OF SOULS (1/day): Action. 60ft radius. 8d8 thunder damage. DC 19 CON save or STUNNED 1 round.
SOUL RESONANCE (1/day): If incapacitated, Fifth acts for you for 1 minute.
HARMONIC SHIELD: Advantage on saves vs charm, fear, psychic damage.
DAILY SPELLS (2/day each, no slots): Fly, Invisibility, Levitate, Protection from Energy, Cure Wounds (3rd level, 3d8+5), Dispel Magic.
UNBREAKABLE BOND: Cannot be destroyed. Returns if more than 100ft away.

item.name: Resonance Key (Legendary)
item.text:
Requires Soulstring Banjo.
SOUL SPEECH: Fifth can speak words, not just emotions.
AMPLIFIED INSPIRATION (1/day): Next Bardic Inspiration = d20+10 (min 11, max 30).
AMPLIFIED CRESCENDO (1/day): Crescendo becomes 120ft radius, 12d8 thunder, stun 2 rounds.

character.notes:
CHARACTER CONCEPT: “Two Souls, One Song” — The satyr bard who carries a willing soul in his banjo. Fifth chose to stay.
DAILY ROUTINE:
1. Morning: Foresight on Fighter (9th slot) 1. Morning: Mind Blank on self (8th slot) 1. Before social: Glibness (8th slot, 1hr)
COMBAT COMBO:
1. BA: Unsettling Words (target subtracts d20 from next save) 1. Action: Hold Monster (WIS save at massive penalty) 1. Fighter auto-crits paralyzed target
ROUND 1 DEFAULT:
- Action: Haste on Fighter - BA: Bardic Inspiration to Cleric
REACTIONS:
- Counterspell (enemy casts dangerous spell) - Silvery Barbs (enemy succeeds on save) - Cutting Words (enemy about to hit)
HELL NOTES:
- Amulet of Veiled Presence: Devils can’t read mind/detect lies (CONFISCATED) - Scale of Sardior: Dominate Dragon 1/day (CONFISCATED) - Mahadi’s Coin: Contact rakshasa across planes (CONFISCATED)
“Babe, it’s my nature.”
character.personality: Smooth-talking, laid-back Southern charm. Protective of friends. Plays music because it’s who he is, not for reward.
character.ideals: Freedom. Music. Loyalty to those who earn it.
character.bonds: Fifth—the soul in the banjo. The party. The music itself.
character.flaws: Can’t resist a stage. Sometimes too clever for his own good.
